---
title: "EncoderDispatch"
---

## Overview

`EncoderDispatch` provides type-safe dispatch from `EncoderVariant` parameter
alternatives to static `ImageEncoder` / `Point2DEncoder` / … `encode()` calls.
It centralizes factory-name and DataManager-type mapping used by
`SlotAssembler`, `DynamicInputSlotWidget`, `DataBank`, and model metadata
(`recommended_encoder` hints).

**Location:** `src/DeepLearning/channel_encoding/EncoderDispatch.hpp`  
**Implementation:** `src/DeepLearning/channel_encoding/EncoderDispatch.cpp`

Concrete encoders register via `EncoderFactory` (`EncoderFactory.hpp`) for
name-based lookup; `EncoderDispatch` is the params-variant entry point used
during input assembly.

## Pipeline position

```
DataManager / DataBank source fetch
     → EncodingSourceVariant (geometry or image pixels)
     → encodeToTensor() / ImageEncoder::encode() / …  // source → torch channel
     → model forward()
```

`EncoderContext` (in `ChannelEncoder.hpp`) carries runtime indexing into the
pre-allocated input tensor. Per-encoder user settings live in `*EncoderParams`
structs in the same header.

## Encoder registry mapping

| Params struct | Factory name | `dataTypeForEncoder()` | Source alternative | Encoder class |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ImageEncoderParams` | `ImageEncoder` | `MediaData` | `ImageEncodingSource` | `ImageEncoder` |
| `Point2DEncoderParams` | `Point2DEncoder` | `PointData` | `std::vector<Point2D<float>>` | `Point2DEncoder` |
| `Mask2DEncoderParams` | `Mask2DEncoder` | `MaskData` | `Mask2D` | `Mask2DEncoder` |
| `Line2DEncoderParams` | `Line2DEncoder` | `LineData` | `Line2D` | `Line2DEncoder` |

Encoder algorithms and `RasterMode` options are summarized in the
[DeepLearning overview](../index.qmd).

## API

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `encodeToTensor(source, tensor, ctx, source_image_size, params)` | Write one channel of a pre-allocated `[B,C,H,W]` tensor |
| `isImageEncoderParams<Params>()` / `isImageEncoder(params)` | Whether params target `MediaData` image input |
| `dataTypeForEncoderParams<Params>()` / `dataTypeForEncoder(params)` | Map to `MediaData`, `PointData`, etc. |
| `encoderFactoryName<Params>()` / `encoderFactoryName(params)` | Map to `ImageEncoder`, etc. |
| `encoderParamsFromFactoryName(name)` | Default params from model `recommended_encoder` hint |
| `assignEncoderFromFactoryName(encoder, name)` | Assign variant; falls back to `ImageEncoderParams` when unknown |

## Types

### `EncoderVariant`

`rfl::TaggedUnion` of all `*EncoderParams` structs, defined in
`bindings/EncoderDecoderBindingTypes.hpp`. Persisted in workspace JSON as the
nested `encoder` field of `SlotBindingData` (edited via
`DynamicInputBindingForm` in the widget).

### `EncodingSourceVariant`

`std::variant` of pre-fetched source data paired with encoder params at encode
time:

```cpp
struct ImageEncodingSource {
    ImageSize size;
    int channels = 1;
    bool is_8bit = true;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data_u8;
    std::vector<float> data_f32;
};

using EncodingSourceVariant = std::variant<
        ImageEncodingSource,
        std::vector<Point2D<float>>,
        Mask2D,
        Line2D>;
```

`SlotAssembler::fetchEncodingSource()` builds the appropriate alternative from
DataManager (or `MediaOverrides` during batch inference). `DataBank` stores
optional `EncodingSourceVariant` provenance alongside encoded tensors.

`encodeToTensor()` checks that the source alternative matches the active encoder
type. On mismatch it logs to `std::cerr` and returns without writing.

### `EncoderContext`

Runtime indexing into the destination tensor (not user-configurable):

| Field | Role |
|---|---|
| `target_channel` | Channel index to write (fixed at `0` for dynamic slots today) |
| `batch_index` | Batch dimension index |
| `height` / `width` | Spatial dimensions of the destination channel |

## `encodeToTensor` behavior

- Writes into an **existing** `at::Tensor` slice; does not allocate the full input map.
- `source_image_size` supplies original image dimensions for geometry coordinate
  scaling. When width/height are non-positive, `(ctx.width, ctx.height)` is used
  as the fallback source size.
- `ImageEncoder` selects `data_u8` or `data_f32` from `ImageEncodingSource`
  based on `is_8bit`.

## SlotAssembler integration

`SlotAssembler::encodeDynamicSlot()`:

1. Fetches `EncodingSourceVariant` from DataManager at
   `computeEncodingFrame(current_frame, batch_index, time_offset, max_frame)`.
2. Builds `EncoderContext` from slot shape (last two dims → `height`/`width`).
3. Calls `encodeToTensor()` with the binding's `EncoderVariant`.

`SlotAssembler` scans input bindings for an `ImageEncoder` with a non-empty
`data_key` to determine `source_image_size` for scaling geometry encoders.
`SlotAssembler::dataTypeForEncoder()` delegates to `dl::dataTypeForEncoder()`.

`InferenceController` uses `isImageEncoder()` when preparing `MediaOverrides`
for thread-safe batch reads.

## DataBank integration

`DataBank::putSource()` stores an `EncodingSourceVariant`. Re-encoding uses
`encodeSourceToTensor()` in `DataBankEncode.hpp`, which calls `encodeToTensor()`
with the stored source and requested `EncoderVariant`.

## ParameterUIHints

Per-encoder form annotations live in `EncoderParamSchemas.hpp` (`normalize`,
`mode`, `gaussian_sigma` tooltips and allowed values).

## Tests

`tests/DeepLearning/channel_encoding/EncoderDispatch.test.cpp` — factory-name
mapping, DataManager type mapping, `encoderParamsFromFactoryName` round-trip,
`isImageEncoder`, and end-to-end point encode via `encodeToTensor`.

Individual encoder behavior is covered by
`tests/DeepLearning/channel_encoding/ImageEncoder.test.cpp` and
`tests/DeepLearning/channel_encoding/RoundTrip.test.cpp`.

Filter with `ctest -R "encoder_dispatch"`.
